flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Johnson County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Johnson County Community College rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 (14.5% → 17.2%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Johnson County Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (64.7% → 71.6%).
